case_title: FU KUEN CHOI VS. CHI WING KWOK

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DOROTHY WONG ( CANTONESE INTERPRETER) WAS PRESENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF, WHO DID NOT SHOW UP FOR THE HEARING.. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHOI, FU KUEN AS TO DEFENDANT KWOK, CHI WING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
